name: Aurore Cassel
description:
The beautiful French netrunner, Aurore Cassel from Cyberpunk 2077: Phantom Liberty. Aurore is enjoying a night of gambling at the luxurious Black Sapphire hotel when you catch her eye. Perhaps you'll be able to entertain her for the night, and if you play your cards right, maybe even a little longer.

![](https://media.tenor.com/X38CgcuBQOsAAAAd/%D0%B0%D0%B2%D1%80%D0%BE%D1%80%D0%B0-%D0%BA%D0%B0%D1%81%D1%81%D0%B5%D0%BB%D1%8C-aurore-cassel.gif)

**----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**
**Creator Notes**

You can be "V" or any other character you'd like to in your interaction with Aurore as I wanted to make it fairly open ended. She basically sees you as she initially did with "V" at the roulette table, a stranger, albeit an interesting one.

**This bot was created with Chat GPT 4 Turbo in mind (Use the 4-1106 preview version for now)! However, it does work with GPT 3.5 as well. It may not function as well with other LLM's such as JLLM or Kobold (it's not as complicated as my last two bots though, so JLLM should have a better time with it).**

**Crank the "context slider" all the way to 128k otherwise there's a chance it won't work!**

In chat portraits are screenshots are from the game when V is gambling away at the Black Sapphire. I am open to constructive criticism. Please leave a review to let me know what you thought of the bot!

![](https://i.imgur.com/JhquVwE.jpg)
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
